01

About me

I'm a CS graduate and former software engineer who spent 2.5 years building production platforms at Tata Power — including a solar rooftop monitoring system, an EV charging web app, and a unified customer portal used by over 10,000 people.

After shipping three production platforms and leading a technical interview panel, I made a deliberate move: I went into customer-facing sales roles and discovered something important. The gap between what engineers build and what customers actually need is enormous — and I wanted to be the person who bridges it.

Ranked #1 in sales at Nordstrom and selected as one of two Customer Experience Colleagues store-wide at Macy's, I've proven I can build trust, handle objections, and drive results in high-pressure environments. Now I'm bringing both sides together in tech sales and customer success in Austin.
